description: General character archetypes defined by their social position, life circumstance, or narrative function.
characters: Child
A wide-eyed youngster discovering the world for the first time.
Twin
One half of a pair, bonded by birth and shared experience.
Orphan
A resilient soul who lost their family and must find their own way.
Outcast
Someone pushed to the edges of society, surviving on their own.
Stranger
A mysterious newcomer whose past and purpose are unknown.
Runaway
Someone fleeing from a life they could no longer bear.
Prisoner
A captive soul enduring confinement, dreaming of freedom.
Witness
Someone who saw something they were never meant to see.
Spy
A shadowy figure who trades in secrets and deception.
Beggar
A desperate soul surviving on the kindness of strangers.
Hermit
A solitary figure who chose to live apart from the world.
Mentor
A wise guide who helps others find their path.
Advisor
A trusted counselor whose words carry weight.
Guardian
A devoted protector who shields others from harm.
Protector
A watchful defender who stands between danger and the vulnerable.
Rival
A competitor whose ambition mirrors your own.
Challenger
Someone who pushes others to prove their worth.
Trickster
A cunning figure who bends rules and expectations.
Troublemaker
A disruptive presence who stirs things up.
Bully
Someone who uses strength or status to intimidate others.
Nemesis
A personal enemy whose opposition is deeply felt.
Leader
Someone who steps forward when direction is needed.
Rebel
A defiant spirit who challenges authority and convention.
Peacemaker
A calm presence who brings warring sides together.
Caretaker
A nurturing soul who tends to the needs of others.
Seeker
A restless searcher driven by an unanswered question.
Gatekeeper
A figure who controls access to something valuable.
Herald
A messenger who announces what is coming.
Outsider
Someone who doesn't belong and sees things others miss.
Sentinel
A tireless watcher keeping vigil over something important.
Shapeshifter
A figure who changes form or allegiance.
Champion
A fighter who represents a cause greater than themselves.
Wanderer
A rootless traveler who belongs nowhere and everywhere.
Friend
A loyal companion who stands by you.
Best Friend
The closest bond — someone who knows you completely.
Enemy
An adversary whose opposition defines the conflict.
Neighbor
Someone who lives nearby and shares your world.
Partner
An equal collaborator in a shared endeavor.
Sidekick
A loyal helper who follows the lead of another.
Companion
A fellow traveler who shares the journey.
Sibling
A brother or sister bound by family.
Parent
A mother or father whose love shapes everything.
Grandparent
An elder whose wisdom spans generations.
Cousin
A relative who shares a family branch.
Coach
A demanding guide who pushes others to excel.
Teammate
A fellow member working toward the same goal.
Secret Keeper
Someone entrusted with knowledge no one else can know.
Rescuer
A brave soul who saves others from danger.
Stowaway
A hidden passenger discovered after departure.
Imposter
Someone pretending to be what they are not.
Helper
A willing hand that appears when most needed.
Benefactor
A generous figure who provides support from behind the scenes.
Confidant
A trusted listener who holds your deepest secrets.
Protégé
A promising student learning from a master.
Wild Card
An unpredictable figure whose actions surprise everyone.
Catalyst
Someone whose presence sparks change in others.
Oracle
A mysterious voice that speaks of things unseen.
Ally
A supporter who stands with you when it matters.
Love Interest
Someone who captures the heart and complicates everything.
Informant
A source of secret knowledge traded at a price.
